channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Iran Says Suspending US Talks, Trump Claims The Opposite
item.description: US-Iran war live updates: The remark by Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf came as reports suggested US President Donald Trump has sent back a revised, tougher peace proposal
item.content:encoded: US-Iran war live updates: The remark by Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf came as reports suggested US President Donald Trump has sent back a revised, tougher peace proposal

item.title: Iran Threatens "New Fronts" In War As Peace Talk Cliffhanger Continues

media:content.media:description: Iran has said it needs the release of $12 billion in frozen assets before engaging in substantive talks.

item.description: Iran's news agency Tasnim reported Tehran had suspended dialogue with mediators in protest at Israel's expanding offensive in Lebanon.
item.content:encoded: Iran's news agency Tasnim reported Tehran had suspended dialogue with mediators in protest at Israel's expanding offensive in Lebanon.

item.title: Man Stuck In 120-Metre Italian Cave Saved By 53 Rescuers

media:content.media:description: The caver was first assisted at a makeshift medical post set up inside the cave.

item.description: The overnight rescue operation took place in the Grotta dei Cinghiali Volanti (Cave of the Flying Wild Boars), one of Italy's main caving areas.
item.content:encoded: The overnight rescue operation took place in the Grotta dei Cinghiali Volanti (Cave of the Flying Wild Boars), one of Italy's main caving areas.

item.title: Russia Bans Aviation Fuel Exports As Ukraine Targets Refineries

media:content.media:description: Ukraine has increased its campaign on Russian energy infrastructure.

item.description: Kyiv has increased attacks on Russian energy facilities in recent weeks, hitting targets as far as the Urals.
item.content:encoded: Kyiv has increased attacks on Russian energy facilities in recent weeks, hitting targets as far as the Urals.

item.title: Iran Suspends US Talks Over Ceasefire Violations "On All Fronts": Report

media:content.media:description: A ceasefire has been in place since April 8 and has held despite occasional incidents.

item.description: Iran was demanding the "immediate cessation" of Israel's military operations in Gaza and Lebanon as a precondition for resuming talks.
item.content:encoded: Iran was demanding the "immediate cessation" of Israel's military operations in Gaza and Lebanon as a precondition for resuming talks.

item.title: Israel Orders Strikes On Beirut As UN Council Gears Up For Emergency Meet

media:content.media:description: Lebanon was dragged into the Middle East war on March 2 when Hezbollah fired rockets towards Israel.

item.description: Israel's Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and Defence Minister Israel Katz said they had ordered strikes on Beirut's usually densely populated southern suburbs.
item.content:encoded: Israel's Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and Defence Minister Israel Katz said they had ordered strikes on Beirut's usually densely populated southern suburbs.

item.title: Chinese Firm Develops Technology That Uses AI To Predict Future Protestors

media:content.media:description: The technology will generate profiles of Chinese citizens.

item.description: The company, Geedge Networks, sells a commercial version of the surveillance and censorship software used by the Chinese government to control online activity.
item.content:encoded: The company, Geedge Networks, sells a commercial version of the surveillance and censorship software used by the Chinese government to control online activity.

item.title: What Is Palantir's PRISMA, The AI Software Ukraine Is Using To Strike Russia

media:content.media:description: PRISMA is not the first Palantir tool deployed in this conflict. (AI-generated image)

item.description: PRISMA brings together real-time battlefield data, drone flight paths, and AI-assisted analysis into a single operational picture.
item.content:encoded: PRISMA brings together real-time battlefield data, drone flight paths, and AI-assisted analysis into a single operational picture.

item.title: Nvidia Turns Spotlight On AI PCs: What They Are And The Risks You May Face

media:content.media:description: Manufacturers say AI PCs can process data more swiftly. than traditional ones.

item.description: Nvidia has turned the spotlight on AI PCs after CEO Jensen Huang launched a new chip that would put artificial intelligence capabilities directly into laptops and desktop computers
item.content:encoded: Nvidia has turned the spotlight on AI PCs after CEO Jensen Huang launched a new chip that would put artificial intelligence capabilities directly into laptops and desktop computers

item.title: $54 Billion Drone Swarm: Pentagon's Plan To Flood Skies With Flying Bombs

media:content.media:description: The drones being tested are relatively cheap, costing around $5,000 each

item.description: The Pentagon believes the US needs to rapidly expand its drone capabilities and has launched an 18-month competition called "Drone Dominance" to identify the most promising manufacturers.
item.content:encoded: The Pentagon believes the US needs to rapidly expand its drone capabilities and has launched an 18-month competition called "Drone Dominance" to identify the most promising manufacturers.

item.title: India, Myanmar Vow Deeper Ties On Security, Trade And Connectivity

media:content.media:description: The President extended a formal invitation to PM Modi to visit Myanmar

item.description: India and Myanmar on Monday pledged to deepen bilateral cooperation across security, trade and infrastructure as Prime Minister Narendra Modi held talks with Myanmar President U Min Aung Hlaing in New Delhi
item.content:encoded: India and Myanmar on Monday pledged to deepen bilateral cooperation across security, trade and infrastructure as Prime Minister Narendra Modi held talks with Myanmar President U Min Aung Hlaing in New Delhi

item.title: How 70 Ships Used 'Dark Passage' And US Help To Cross Strait Of Hormuz

media:content.media:description: Indirect talks between the US and Iran have continued through mediators.

item.description: Since the war started, ships passing near Iran without obtaining permits from Iranian authorities face almost a certain threat of being attacked by drones or missiles.
item.content:encoded: Since the war started, ships passing near Iran without obtaining permits from Iranian authorities face almost a certain threat of being attacked by drones or missiles.

item.title: Russia Fired Record 8,150 Drones At Ukraine In May: Report

media:content.media:description: Russia launched one of its worst attacks on Kyiv in months in May

item.description: Russia also fired 211 missiles in May, among the highest monthly figures, at a time when Kyiv called on the United States for urgent help.
item.content:encoded: Russia also fired 211 missiles in May, among the highest monthly figures, at a time when Kyiv called on the United States for urgent help.

item.title: The Night Paris Plunged Into Chaos: Riots, Death, Mayhem Grip City Streets

media:content.media:description: A man waves a Paris Saint-Germain flag as a barricade burns in the 16th arrondissement of Paris.

item.description: Paris Saint-Germain retained the Champions League title on Saturday, beating Arsenal 4-3 on penalties in Budapest, but the joy of victory gave way to destruction on the streets of France's capital.
item.content:encoded: Paris Saint-Germain retained the Champions League title on Saturday, beating Arsenal 4-3 on penalties in Budapest, but the joy of victory gave way to destruction on the streets of France's capital.

item.title: US, Iran Keep Launching Attacks On Each Other As Negotiations Stall

media:content.media:description: Weeks of indirect talks have so far failed to agree an end to the war.

item.description: The latest exchange of fire coincided with Israel expanding its offensive into Lebanon, with Prime Minister Netanyahu vowing to push deeper into the country.
item.content:encoded: The latest exchange of fire coincided with Israel expanding its offensive into Lebanon, with Prime Minister Netanyahu vowing to push deeper into the country.

item.title: 'Made My Views Clear': Zohran Mamdani Skips Key Parade Celebrating Israel

media:content.media:description: Zohran Mamdani, NYC's first Muslim mayor, has remained steadfast in his pro-Palestinian advocacy.

item.description: The Israel Day parade has always been a must-attend event for mayors, governors and other political leaders eager to win over revelers.
item.content:encoded: The Israel Day parade has always been a must-attend event for mayors, governors and other political leaders eager to win over revelers.

item.title: Copycat Gangs, 1,000 Shooters: Inside Canada's 'Lawrence Bishnoi' Problem

media:content.media:description: Bishnoi has been in custody in India for around a decade

item.description: The person whose deportation hearing was underway before the Immigration and Refugee Board on Thursday is suspected to be a member of an Edmonton-based extortion gang linked to violence in at least three Canadian provinces.
item.content:encoded: The person whose deportation hearing was underway before the Immigration and Refugee Board on Thursday is suspected to be a member of an Edmonton-based extortion gang linked to violence in at least three Canadian provinces.

item.title: Trump's Mount Rushmore Moment? AI Photo Shows Him With 4 US Presidents

media:content.media:description: Trump did not provide any comments on the post

item.description: The edited image depicts Trump standing alongside the faces of former US presidents George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, Theodore Roosevelt, and Abraham Lincoln.
item.content:encoded: The edited image depicts Trump standing alongside the faces of former US presidents George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, Theodore Roosevelt, and Abraham Lincoln.

item.title: Watch: Indian Ambassador Speaks Mandarin, Gives Tour Of Embassy In Beijing

media:content.media:description: The Ministry of External Affairs appointed Doraiswami as India's Ambassador to China in March

item.description: Vikram Doraiswami takes viewers on a tour of the embassy, explains the services it offers, and shows its different sections.
item.content:encoded: Vikram Doraiswami takes viewers on a tour of the embassy, explains the services it offers, and shows its different sections.

item.title: A Bachelor's In Rare Earths? China Has Schools For That

media:content.media:description: Rare earths can be difficult and costly to process.

item.description: Donald Trump and other Western leaders have pledged billions of dollars in investments to break China's chokehold on rare earths refining - a powerful lever Beijing has wielded in its trade war with Washington
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump and other Western leaders have pledged billions of dollars in investments to break China's chokehold on rare earths refining - a powerful lever Beijing has wielded in its trade war with Washington
